summary: AgentForge v4.5 Labs Features Testing - All 14 backend tests passed, all 6 frontend Labs tabs verified working. New experimental features (World Model, Software DNA, God Mode, Discovery, Marketplace) fully functional.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/health - API health check returns 'healthy'
✅ GET /api/world-model/categories - Returns 5 categories (frontend, backend, game_engines, infrastructure, ai_ml)
✅ GET /api/world-model/insights - Returns analytics with total_projects_analyzed, top_technologies, recommendations
✅ GET /api/world-model/graph - Returns knowledge graph with nodes, edges, stats
✅ GET /api/dna/categories - Returns 6 gene categories (auth, ui, data, game, infra, ai)
✅ GET /api/dna/library - Returns full gene library with categories, genes, stats
✅ GET /api/god-mode/templates - Returns 5 SaaS templates (analytics, marketplace, saas_starter, ai_tool, community)
✅ POST /api/god-mode/create - Creates SaaS from prompt, returns session_id, project_id, plan
✅ GET /api/discovery/types - Returns 5 experiment types (architecture, ui_component, algorithm, integration, game_system)
✅ POST /api/discovery/start - Starts experiment, returns id, type, hypothesis, iterations
✅ GET /api/discovery/experiments - Returns list of experiments
✅ GET /api/marketplace/categories - Returns 5 module categories (frontend, backend, game, ai, infrastructure)
✅ GET /api/marketplace/modules - Returns module list
✅ GET /api/marketplace/modules?limit=10 - Returns limited module list
✅ Frontend: Labs tab visible in ProjectWorkspace with 'NEW' badge
✅ Frontend: Labs Panel renders with 'AgentForge Labs' header and 'EXPERIMENTAL' badge
✅ Frontend: Overview tab renders with data-testid='labs-overview'
✅ Frontend: World Model tab renders with data-testid='labs-world-model'
✅ Frontend: Software DNA tab renders with data-testid='labs-dna'
✅ Frontend: God Mode tab renders with data-testid='labs-god-mode'
✅ Frontend: Discovery tab renders with data-testid='labs-discovery'
✅ Frontend: Marketplace tab renders with data-testid='labs-marketplace'
✅ Frontend: God Mode prompt input (data-testid='god-mode-prompt') visible
✅ Frontend: God Mode execute button (data-testid='god-mode-execute') visible
✅ No JavaScript console errors detected
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new route files properly integrated into server.py (world_model.py, software_dna.py, god_mode.py, discovery.py, marketplace.py)
LabsPanel.jsx component properly imports and uses data-testid attributes for all tabs
All API endpoints use query parameters format (not JSON body) - test file corrected to match
God Mode uses LLM to generate SaaS plans - working correctly
Discovery experiments use LLM for iterations - working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 6 Labs tabs rendering correctly with proper data-testid attributes)

seed_data_creation: None required - APIs return static templates/categories, dynamic data generated via LLM calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Labs features verified working. API endpoints use query params (not JSON body) for POST requests. God Mode creates SaaS projects via LLM. Discovery runs experiments via LLM iterations. Frontend Labs Panel has 6 tabs: Overview, World Model, DNA, God Mode, Discovery, Marketplace. All have proper data-testid attributes. Previous iteration_17 tests still valid (modular routes, Build Farm, 3D System Map).
